title: Return to Sabaody: Key Exchange
description: In the Return to Sabaody storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #11, Unknown person #22, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #21, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #15 as the scene develops across pages 9–12.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Ahhhhh!!! Captain straw hat luffy has arrived!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: You may not know these faces now....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I'm looking forward to seeing everyone!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Are you guys in disguise, too?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Call me big boss, ya numb-skulls!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: This concert is over!!! Stop the music!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: utterly preposterous. Tell the world from me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The pirate "Straw hat" Luffy... is alive!!!
